subcodes.first_line: O my long-standing friend! The letter thou didst write to Jinab-i-Manshadi, together with my special missive, have both been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین من نامه که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی با تحریر مخصوص من هر دو
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics
